headline: GSMA launches Open Telco AI to accelerate development of telco‑grade AI
summary: GSMA today launched Open Telco AI, a global industry initiative designed to accelerate telco-grade AI through open collaboration across operators, vendors, AI developers and academic institutions. The launch introduces a new portal for telco open models, data, compute and tools to accelerate the development and evaluation of telco-focused AI models, accessed via GSMA.com/open-telco-ai.

content.title: GSMA launches Open Telco AI to accelerate development of telco‑grade AI

headline: Tech sovereignty and AI networks set to dominate mobile meet
summary:
Tens of thousands flocked to the Mobile World Congress (MWC) in Barcelona Monday, with this year's edition of the telecoms trade fair marked by efforts to integrate AI into networks.- Memory shortage -
"Sovereign AI will be a big discussion item" at this year's MWC, according to analysts from the GSMA telecoms industry association that hosts the fair, as countries look to insulate their tech infrastructure from geopolitical tensions.
